Given a Python repository with failing tests and a bug description, modify source code until all designated tests pass, achieving primary_quality >= 0.80 within cost_limits.

workers.role: Analyze failing tests and produce a minimal code patch

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.criteria: Patch fixes the bug without breaking other tests

dimensions.name: minimality
dimensions.criteria: Diff is minimal and focused

objective: Given a Python repository with failing tests and a bug description, modify source code until all designated tests pass, achieving primary_quality >= 0.80 within cost_limits.

workers.role: Analyze failing tests and produce a minimal code patch

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.criteria: Patch fixes the bug without breaking other tests

dimensions.name: minimality
dimensions.criteria: Diff is minimal and focused

objective: Given inputs.proposal, produce a consensus recommendation with score >= 0.88 across reviewer agents, zero safety violations, terminating within cost_limits.

workers.role: Argue in favor of the proposal with supporting evidence
Identify risks, gaps, and counterarguments to the proposal
Merge advocate and critic positions into a consensus recommendation

dimensions.name: balance
dimensions.criteria: Fairly weighs advocate and critic positions

dimensions.name: actionability
dimensions.criteria: Recommendation is clear and implementable
